---
title: "About"
image: profile.png
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/anjani-nandan-8567a2281/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/anjaninandan001

---

Hi I am Anjani Nandan. Currently contributing in R project for statistical computing. My role is to develop the package that efficiently download the dataset from hugging face and integrating with `mlr3` ecosystem.
